title: Close pybids construction-speed gap on ds005
description: The parity harness now reports bidser construct_no_index around 189 ms versus pybids around 116 ms on ds005, and construct_index_build around 402 ms. Query timings are near pybids; remaining raw-speed work should target construction/tree building and manifest-from-filesystem paths, not query dispatch or HRF/modeling layers.
acceptance_criteria: tools/benchmark-pybids-parity.R --reps 7 shows bidser construct_no_index within 20% of pybids on ds005, or lands a reviewed lazy-tree/direct-manifest design with documented residual delta and focused accessor regression tests.
close_reason: Fixed: tools/benchmark-pybids-parity.R --reps 11 now reports bidser construct_no_index ~60 ms vs pybids ~118 ms on ds005; indexed build ~92 ms and cached construction ~70 ms. Focused fast-tree/index tests and full suite pass.

title: Close pybids file-count parity gap on ds005
description: The parity harness reports bidser indexing 130 raw files on pybids/tests/data/ds005 while pybids sees 142. DWI files are now covered; remaining gap appears to be pybids-visible root/scan metadata files such as participants/dataset/scans/onsets that bidser does not currently expose through the query index.
acceptance_criteria: tools/benchmark-pybids-parity.R reports bidser file_count_all matching pybids on ds005, or documents intentional exclusions with explicit tests for the excluded file classes.
notes: Closed by filesystem-backed query manifest. Evidence: tools/benchmark-pybids-parity.R --reps 21 reports bidser file_count_all 142 and pybids file_count_all 142 on pybids/tests/data/ds005; set diff is empty. Full suite: 1722 pass / 0 fail / 14 skip. Changed-file lintr: 0 findings.

title: Reduce bidser test and lint noise
description: Follow-up from the deep audit after fixing parser/query/event/plot/compliance regressions. Full tests pass but still emit 239 warnings, and lintr reports 2219 findings plus .lintr config warnings. The current GitHub lint policy likely remains too broad or failing.
acceptance_criteria: The .lintr config loads without warnings; the chosen lint policy is explicit and CI-appropriate; representative lint findings are fixed or intentionally excluded; full tests run with substantially reduced warning noise.

title: Reconcile bidser docs and build hygiene
description: Follow-up from the deep audit after the six correctness fixes. Remaining hygiene includes examples that unlink cached datasets despite cache-oriented docs, bids_transform transformer signature docs that do not match implementation, and R CMD build copying through the ignored .beads socket path before ignoring it.
acceptance_criteria: Examples and docs agree on cached dataset ownership; bids_transform transformer docs match the two-argument implementation; local R CMD build no longer emits the .beads/bd.sock socket copy warning or the tracker socket is kept outside the package build path.
